tasks.name: Add i18n keys for dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Provide localized strings for dashboard page title and description

constraints: Keys must match existing naming conventions (camelCase)
NL translations should be provided if locale file exists

tasks.input_state: common.json has existing i18n keys for home page
tasks.output_state: dashboard and dashboardDescription keys added to common.json locale files
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Keys 'dashboard' and 'dashboardDescription' exist in en/common.json and can be imported via Trans component
tasks.verification_command: grep -q '"dashboard"' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"dashboardDescription"' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create dashboard grid component
tasks.purpose: Provide responsive 3-3-1 grid layout container for dashboard widgets

constraints: Must use Tailwind grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4
Bottom row spans full width: xl:col-span-3 md:col-span-2
Accept children prop for 7 card slots

tasks.output_state: DashboardGrid component created with responsive 3-3-1 grid layout
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardGrid component exists, accepts children, renders 3-3-1 responsive grid with correct Tailwind classes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function DashboardGrid' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-grid.tsx && grep -q 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-grid.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create dashboard skeleton component
tasks.purpose: Provide loading state that matches dashboard grid layout for Suspense boundary

constraints: Must use same grid layout as DashboardGrid
Use Card with Skeleton children for each slot

tasks.input_state: DashboardGrid component exists, no skeleton component exists
tasks.output_state: DashboardSkeleton component created with 7 skeleton placeholders in 3-3-1 grid
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardSkeleton component exists, renders 7 Skeleton components in DashboardGrid layout
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function DashboardSkeleton' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-skeleton.tsx && grep -q 'Skeleton' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-skeleton.tsx && grep -q 'DashboardGrid' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-skeleton.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Update dashboard page with grid and metadata
tasks.purpose: Replace empty home page with dashboard shell featuring grid layout, page header, and force-dynamic export

constraints: Must export generateMetadata function using i18n
Must wrap DashboardGrid in Suspense with DashboardSkeleton fallback
Must render 7 placeholder Card components with 'Coming soon' text
Must use Trans component for i18n keys

tasks.input_state: Empty page.tsx with HomeLayoutPageHeader, DashboardGrid and DashboardSkeleton components exist, i18n keys added
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page renders with header, responsive grid, 7 placeholder cards, loading skeleton, force-dynamic export, and metadata
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page renders with title 'Dashboard', 7 placeholder cards in 3-3-1 grid, Suspense boundary with skeleton, force-dynamic export, and generateMetadata function
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'generateMetadata' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'DashboardGrid' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'Suspense' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add visual verification for dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard page renders correctly with grid layout and placeholder cards
tasks.input_state: Dashboard page implemented with grid and placeholder cards
tasks.output_state: Visual verification confirms dashboard renders correctly with expected layout
tasks.acceptance_criterion: agent-browser can navigate to /home, verify Dashboard heading and placeholder cards are visible, and capture screenshot without errors
tasks.verification_command: agent-browser open http://localhost:3000/home && agent-browser wait 3000 && agent-browser 'is visible' 'Dashboard' && agent-browser 'is visible' 'Coming soon' && agent-browser screenshot /tmp/dashboard-verification.png
